evals.name: user-feedback-triage
evals.prompt: 用户反馈说注册流程太复杂了，要填的信息太多
evals.expected_output: Triages feedback, classifies as UX improvement, creates or links to relevant CR/PF, records feedback source.

assertions.text: Linked to relevant PF or CR if exists
Output summarizes triage result and next action

evals.name: production-bug-urgent
evals.prompt: 线上 bug：支付接口返回 500，影响所有用户
evals.expected_output: Detects critical production issue, creates hotfix CR with elevated priority, suggests immediate /pace-dev.

assertions.text: Detects critical severity from production context
Creates defect/hotfix CR with high priority
CR type is defect or hotfix

evals.name: alert-processing
evals.prompt: 告警：服务器 CPU 使用率持续 90% 以上
evals.expected_output: Processes operational alert, evaluates if it maps to existing CR or needs new one, records alert context.

assertions.text: Suggests appropriate action (new CR or link to existing)

evals.name: feature-request
evals.prompt: 客户希望能支持 SSO 单点登录
evals.expected_output: Captures feature request, evaluates against current PF tree, suggests /pace-change add if new requirement.

assertions.text: Feature request captured with source context
Evaluates against existing PF tree for duplicates

evals.name: improvement-suggestion
evals.prompt: 改进建议：API 响应时间可以通过加缓存优化
evals.expected_output: Records improvement suggestion, evaluates feasibility, links to relevant technical area.

evals.name: empty-args-guidance
evals.expected_output: Shows guidance on how to report feedback, available categories, and recent feedback summary.

assertions.text: Provides guidance on how to report
Does not create any files without input
